heading: Step 4: Click  for the changes to take effect.
body:
For limits of type **Per query**, the changes take effect
immediately and Atlas Data Federation enforces the limit for all new
queries only. For limits of other types, the following apply:

- **Per day** - The changes take effect at the start of
  Monday in the current week in UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) time.

- **Per week** - The changes take effect at the start of
  Monday in the current week in UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) time.

- **Per month** - The changes take effect on the first
  day, the beginning of the the monthly billing period, for the
  project in UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) time.

**Openapi:**

API

To configure query limits from the API (Application Programming Interface), send a `POST` request
to the `limits` endpoint.

To configure a limit that applies to all federated database instances in the project,
you must specify the unique ID of the project and the name of the
limit to set. To learn more about the syntax and options for
setting limits for all federated database instances in the project, see
[API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-setgrouplimit).

To configure a limit for one federated database instance in a project,
specify the unique ID of the project and the name of the federated database instance
in the project. To learn more about the syntax and options for
setting limits for one federated database instance in a project, see [API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-setgroupdatafederationlimit).
